location: Guaranteed drop from the Misbegotten Crusader boss at the end of Cave of the Forlorn, a small dungeon in the Consecrated Snowfield (reached via the Grand Lift of Rold).
tactics: The cave entrance sits southeast of Ordina, Liturgical Town and is easy to walk past — a camouflaged Giant Land Octopus sits right in the doorway and will grab you if you're not careful.
You must spend two Stonesword Keys on the imp statue gate to get inside; follow the eastern passage as it curves north to reach the boss chamber.
Misbegotten Crusader fights like an oversized Misbegotten — jump slams and grab attacks — and is vulnerable to Bleed and Scarlet Rot.
It's a guaranteed drop, not an RNG chance, so one clean kill is all you need.
lore: A greatsword shaped from light itself, meant to visually embody the Elden Ring. Radagon forged it as a personal emblem of the Golden Order's doctrine, though its design is said to trace back to a gift from his first wife, Rennala.

builds.name: Faith Quality Greatsword
builds.why: C-scaling Faith with an innate Physical/Holy split, a strong AoE holy weapon art (Establish Order), and a built-in bonus vs. undead that also blocks skeleton revival.
